title: FROM CAMPUS TO CODEBASE: JUIT ALUMNI AT MICROSOFT
content: Aug, 10 2024 at 11:00 am LT3, JUIT FROM CAMPUS TO CODEBASE: JUIT ALUMNI AT MICROSOFT The JUIT Alumni Cell, Department of Computer Science and Engineering and Information Technology and Training and Placement Cell is hosting an interactive session with JUIT alumni working at Microsoft at JUIT. This could be a fantastic opportunity for students to gain insights into the industry, learn about career paths, and network with professionals. <
